proposal: Kill the recurring World Cup knockout duplicates at the source in build-events.js. ESPN re-emits knockout slots as bracket placeholders ('Semifinal 2 Winner at Semifinal 1 Winner') whose title shares zero words with the channel-confirmed ai-research events ('VM-finalen 2026'), so the sport|title|time key AND the title-only fuzzy check both missed them and both copies survived every rebuild. Added a venue-based fuzzy match (same sport + same venue + overlapping date range — for point-in-time events this collapses to an exact-kickoff match, so it can't collide unrelated fixtures) as a second match kind, and when a static event matches an ai-research one ONLY by venue (titles disagree entirely) the AI event wins and the placeholder is dropped — while the existing title-match path (golf/stage tournaments) still lets the authoritative static fetcher win. Adds 2 build-events tests (WC dedup keeps the AI copy; two different-venue same-time matches are NOT merged).
evidence: verify-log.json (2026-07-13): 'RECURRING build-events dedup gap: these tentative NRK/TV2 placeholders have now been removed 11, 12 and 13 Jul and keep returning because build-events dedupes on sport|title|time and the ESPN titles differ from the ai-research Norwegian titles. Permanent fix belongs in build-events ... verify can only whack-a-mole them daily.' — flagged three days running, explicitly handed to improve/self-repair.

verify removed 3 ESPN placeholders again 2026-07-13: 'Spain at France' (dup of 'VM-semifinale 1'), 'Semifinal 2 Loser at Semifinal 1 Loser' (dup of 'VM-bronsefinale'), 'Semifinal 2 Winner at Semifinal 1 Winner' (dup of 'VM-finalen 2026'); the ai copies carry the NTB-confirmed NRK/TV 2 channel, the placeholders a tentative guess + an unreadable title.

Real-data rebuild (docs/data copy in a temp dir) with the fix: all three ESPN placeholders are deduped away, the channel-confirmed ai-research events survive, and 'Argentina at England' (resolved SF2 with no AI counterpart) correctly stays — no other football event affected.
npm test: 263 passed incl. 2 new build-events cases (WC knockout dedup keeps the AI copy; different-venue same-time matches stay separate).
